metadata.title: StudyTrace - Academic Process Evidence and Appeal Reports
metadata.description: StudyTrace helps international students organize writing-process proof, citation sources, AI-use boundaries, risk explanations, and appeal evidence reports.
metadata.keywords: academic integrity appeal, academic evidence chain, AI use disclosure, writing process proof, international students

sign.email_verification_hint: Use an email address you can access. You must verify your email after signing up.
sign.verify_email_sent: Verification email sent. Please check your inbox.
sign.verify_email_required: Please verify your email address before signing in.
sign.resend_verification_sent: Verification email resent. Please check your inbox.

sign.verify_email_not_verified_yet: Not verified yet. Please click the link in your email first.
sign.verify_email_account_mismatch: Signed in as {current}. This page is waiting for {expected}.
sign.forgot_password_description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password
sign.reset_link_sent: If an account exists for {email}, a reset link is on its way.
sign.reset_link_sent_tip: Check your inbox (and spam folder). The link expires in 1 hour.
sign.reset_link_failed: Failed to send reset email. Please try again later.
sign.reset_password_description: Choose a new password for your account
sign.reset_password_invalid_token: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
sign.reset_password_success: Password reset. Please sign in with your new password.
sign.reset_password_failed: Failed to reset password. Please try again.
sign.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
